_meta.what: Blessing BONUS STATS — flat stats a champion gains purely from (rarity x awakening level), granted when the champion has a Blessing assigned. Introduced in Patch 8.20.
_meta.source: Plarium in-game Help / 'Blessings Bonus Stats' doc supplied by Mike 2026-07-21 — VERBATIM, Tier-1 factual game data (not editorial).
_meta.why_it_matters: This is the awakening term the model never had. Mike flagged it 2026-07-21: 'we haven't even introduced awakening into the formula!'. Both inputs are already captured at 100% (rarity, awakenLevel), so this is implementable with NO new acquisition.
rules: CUMULATIVE: a champion at awakening level N receives the bonuses for every level 1..N.
GATED on having a Blessing assigned (blessingId). Blessing CHOICE does not change these stats — only rarity and awakening level do.

Champion rarity, not blessing rarity, selects the column. A Legendary taking a Rare blessing still uses the Legendary row for these bonus stats (the blessing's own EFFECT is separate, and a lower-rarity blessing grants extra bonuses at certain levels — see note).
C.DMG is a PERCENTAGE; every other value is FLAT.
SEPARATE from the blessing's ABILITY (Indomitable Spirit, Iron Will, Miracle Heal, ...), which also scales with awakening level and is NOT modelled here.
_meta.magnitude_note: A 6-star-awakened Legendary gains HP +8500, ATK +750, DEF +600, C.DMG +38%, RES +75, ACC +75, SPD +15. For scale: fielded team HP on this corpus runs 10k-28k, and Spider's ACC floor is stage x 10 — so ACC +75 is ~7.5 stages of that floor.
_meta.unverified: Whether the bonus requires the blessing to be assigned (assumed yes, per 'Blessings now offer extra bonus stats') and whether a lower-rarity blessing on a higher-rarity champion alters these specific values. Confirm in-game before relying on edge cases.
